html:
SAMMANTRÄDESPROTOKOLL

2025-12-15 Kommunfullmäktige

Digitalt signerat Utdragsbestyrkande

§219

Dnr KS 2025-3

Meddelanden - anmäls i kommunfullmäktige Beslut Meddelanden anmäls och läggs till handlingarna.

Beslutsunderlag Missiv - Revisionsrapport: Fritidshemmens kvalitet Granskning av fritidshemmens kvalitet - November 2025

Beslutande sammanträde Beslutsgång Ordföranden frågar om kommunfullmäktige kan godkänna meddelandena och lägga dessa till handlingarna, och finner att kommunfullmäktige beslutar i enlighet med detta.

Paragrafen är justerad
tldr: The municipality has received a report that examines the quality of the after-school programs. This report has been presented to the politicians in the municipal council.
lattlast:
At a meeting of the Norrtälje municipal council on December 15, 2025, politicians reviewed a report. The report concerned the quality of after-school care programs.

A report on the quality of the after-school care programs was written in November 2025. This type of report is called an audit report, which means it is a review of how the work has been carried out.

The politicians in the municipal council have now received this information and added it to the municipality's official documents. This means they have reviewed the information but have not yet made any new decisions regarding changes at this stage.
